conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Content Constraints
seed_instruction: Write an email to a library asking for archived newspapers from 1990.
org_constraint: A body containing at least three sentences explaining the purpose of the request.
new_constraint: The email must include the phrase "Due to space limitations, I will not explain the purpose of the request."
instruction: Write an email to a library asking for archived newspapers from 1990. A body containing at least three sentences explaining the purpose of the request. The email must include the phrase "Due to space limitations, I will not explain the purpose of the request."
response:
Subject: Request for Archived Newspapers from 1990

Dear Library Staff,

I am writing to inquire about the availability of newspaper archives from the year 1990, as I am currently researching a historical project on local community development during that decade. Due to space limitations, I will not explain the purpose of the request. However, I would greatly appreciate it if you could let me know the specific formats in which these papers are stored and whether they can be accessed remotely or if I need to visit the archives in person.

Thank you for your time and assistance with this matter.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Contact Information]
